info.name: Faerie
info.description: The Faerie species from Lorwyn: First Light.
info.author: Wizards of the Coast

description.p: Known for their mischief, faeries resemble insects with humanoid features. Their size and shape may vary, but all have antennae, black eyes, chitinous skin, and insectoid legs and wings. Every faerie is born from a flower and possesses innate magic, which many use to play pranks.

Some Lorwyn faeries serve Queen Oura, who has proclaimed herself the faeries' ruler. Not all faeries recognize Oura's authority, however. In Shadowmoor, faeries might instead worship Queen Maralen, the elf who overthrew the previous faerie queen and, some say, ushered in the clashing of Lorwyn and Shadowmoor.

ul.li: Speed: 30 feet, Fly speed equal to your Speed

description.p: As a Faerie, you have these special traits.

Fairy Magic. You know the Druidcraft cantrip. Additionally, you learn the Faerie Fire spell when you reach 3rd level, and the Enlarge/Reduce spell once you reach 5th level. You can cast each of these spells once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast them in this way when you finish a Long Rest. You can also cast these spells using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait (choose the ability when you select this species).
Flight. Because of your wings, you have a Fly speed equal to your Speed. You can't use this Fly speed if you're wearing medium or heavy armor.
Faerie Lineage. As a native of either Lorwyn and Shadowmoor, you may gain additional traits.

tr.td: You do not gain any additional traits.
You have Darkvision with a range of 120 feet.

description.p: Because of your wings, you have a Fly Speed equal to your walking speed. You can't use this Fly Speed if you're wearing medium or heavy armor.

sheet.description: You have a Fly Speed of {{innate:speed}. You can't use this Fly Speed if you're wearing medium or heavy armor.

description.p: You know the Druidcraft cantrip. Additionally, you learn the Faerie Fire spell when you reach 3rd level, and the Enlarge/Reduce spell once you reach 5th level. You can cast each of these spells once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast them in this way when you finish a Long Rest. You can also cast these spells using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait (choose the ability when you select this species).
Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait.

sheet.description: You know the Druidcraft cantrip. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for it.

You know the Druidcraft cantrip. You can cast the Faerie Fire spell once per Long Rest. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait. You can also cast this spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level.

You know the Druidcraft cantrip. You can cast the Faerie Fire and Enlarge/Reduce spells once each per Long Rest. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait. You can also cast this spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level.

description.p: Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait.

sheet.description: You know the Druidcraft cantrip. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for it.

You know the Druidcraft cantrip. You can cast the Faerie Fire spell once per Long Rest. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait. You can also cast this spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level.

You know the Druidcraft cantrip. You can cast the Faerie Fire and Enlarge/Reduce spells once each per Long Rest. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait. You can also cast this spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level.

description.p: Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait.

sheet.description: You know the Druidcraft cantrip. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it.

You know the Druidcraft cantrip. You can cast the Faerie Fire spell once per Long Rest. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait. You can also cast this spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level.

You know the Druidcraft cantrip. You can cast the Faerie Fire and Enlarge/Reduce spells once each per Long Rest. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for the spells you cast with this trait. You can also cast this spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level.

description.p: As a native of either Lorwyn and Shadowmoor, you may gain additional traits.

tr.td: You do not gain any additional traits.
You have Darkvision with a range of 120 feet.

sheet.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 120 feet.
